aeo_readiness.summary: The business has some foundational elements for AEO but lacks critical optimizations and content depth.
quick_wins: Implement a Google Business Profile and encourage customer reviews.
Expand service pages with detailed, keyword-rich content.
Add structured data for FAQs and services to enhance search visibility.

gbp_analysis.summary: No evidence of a Google Business Profile (GBP) was found, which is crucial for local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and ratings on Google.

nap_citations.summary: Inconsistent or missing Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web could be harming local search performance.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information on major directories (e.g., Yelp, Yellow Pages).
Ensure NAP consistency across the website and all online platforms.
Actively manage and respond to customer reviews on citation sites.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and structured data for services.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for specific HVAC services in Georgetown, Texas.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Create individual service pages with location-based keywords and FAQ sections.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publish blog posts or guides on common HVAC issues and solutions in the Georgetown area to build topical authority.

page_title: AC Repair Georgetown | We'll Fix It Right - Cool Kids
